summary: KOSPI recovers to 5,554 points, gaining 2.74% as Middle East tensions ease. Global risk appetite improves, supported by lower crude prices and continued retail buying.
market_drivers: Market Recovery: KOSPI closed at 5,554, up 2.74% from previous session.
Geopolitical Relief: Easing Middle East tensions boosted risk appetite.
Retail Resilience: Retail investors continue to provide support, offsetting foreign selling.
